one_time_description: Writedown of intercorporate advances to RBDC Trucking and Lhtako Gas and Convenience that were no longer recoverable
economic_notes: GBEs include Red Bluff Development Corporation, RBDC Trucking Ltd., and Lhtako Gas and Convenience Ltd., accounted for using modified equity method. Combined GBE revenue was $4,377,635 with a net loss of $679,030. Nation has investments in Castle Mountain (2.5% interest) and Dene Developments.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (not 2024). Nation is in BC. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Red Bluff Development Corporation, RBDC Trucking Ltd., Lhtako Gas and Convenience Ltd. One consolidated non-incorporated entity: Lhtako Dene Nation Housing Management. Large one-time writedown of $749,387 for unrecoverable intercorporate advances. Segment disclosure shows total segment revenue of $1,755,800 vs consolidated $2,505,187 — difference of $749,387 relates to GBE loss recorded separately in the change in net financial assets statement. Nation was not in compliance with all CMHC agreements as at March 31, 2020. Bank overdraft of $83,722 reported in cash. Honoraria of $235,587 reported but no formal remuneration schedule provided. COVID-19 disclosed as subsequent event. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $440,776 + FNHA $156,765 + DFO $5,000 + CMHC $44,141 + CMHC Subsidies $48,193 + Province of BC $1,169,187 + Carrier Chilcotin Tribal Council $7,255 + CCATEC $31,522 + FNESC $3,758 + New Relationship Trust $2,900 = $1,909,497; osr = $2,505,187 - $1,909,497 = $595,690.
